---
title: "Teaching"
---

This page will highlight my teaching in GIS, cartography, uncrewed aerial systems, geospatial analysis, and professional development.

## Teaching focus

- Applied GIS and geospatial problem solving
- Cartography and geovisualization
- Uncrewed aerial systems and remote sensing
- Community-engaged geospatial projects
- Professional preparation for students

## Selected courses

Content coming soon.
